meaning_english: Sharp / Bitter / Sour. Example: Acrimonious (bitter speech), Acid (sour substance).
War. Example: Belligerent (hostile/warlike), Rebellion (armed resistance).
Go / Yield / Surrender. Example: Precede (go before), Concede (admit defeat/yield).
Body. Example: Corpse (dead body), Corporation (a body of people).
People. Example: Democracy (rule by people), Demography (study of populations).
Sleep. Example: Dormant (inactive/sleeping), Dormitory (sleeping room).
Make / Do. Example: Factory (place where things are made), Manufacture (make by hand).
Birth / Race / Kind. Example: Generate (to produce), Genealogy (study of family history).
Step / Go. Example: Progress (step forward), Digress (go away from main topic).
Throw. Example: Reject (throw back), Eject (throw out).
Place. Example: Location (a place), Local (belonging to a place).
Light. Example: Lucid (clear/bright), Illuminate (to light up).
Great / Large. Example: Magnify (make large), Magnificent (grand/great).
Send. Example: Dismiss (send away), Transmit (send across).
Change. Example: Mutation (change in form), Immutable (unchangeable).
New. Example: Novelty (newness), Novice (a beginner/new person).
Peace. Example: Pacify (to calm/make peace), Pacific (peaceful).
Father. Example: Patriot (one who loves fatherland), Paternal (fatherly).
Foot / Child. Example: Pedestrian (walker on foot), Pediatrician (child doctor).
Fold / Tangle. Example: Complex (many folds/complicated), Perplexed (confused).
Guide / Rule. Example: Regal (royal), Regulate (to control by rules).
Break / Burst. Example: Erupt (burst out), Interrupt (break into).
Cut. Example: Dissect (cut apart), Section (a part cut off).
Alone / Sun. Example: Solitary (alone), Solar (relating to the sun).
Look / See. Example: Inspect (look into), Spectator (one who watches).
Build. Example: Construct (to build), Destruction (breaking down).
Pull / Drag. Example: Attract (pull towards), Extract (pull out).
Come. Example: Prevent (to stop from coming), Convention (a coming together).
Live / Life. Example: Vivid (full of life/bright), Vital (essential for life).
Voice / Call. Example: Vocal (relating to voice), Advocate (call for/support).
